parameters.jsCode: return $input.all().map((item) => { const row = item.json; const signals = [row.linkedin_post_url ? `Recent LinkedIn evidence: ${row.linkedin_post_url}` : '', row.linkedin_url ? `Company LinkedIn: ${row.linkedin_url}` : '', row.social_signal || '', row.competitor_signal || ''].filter(Boolean); return { json: { ...row, research_summary: row.research_summary || signals.join(' | ') || `Public context exists for ${row.company || row.company_domain || row.email}.`, social_signal: row.social_signal || signals[0] || '', offer_type: /agency|revops|marketing/i.test(`${row.company} ${row.social_signal} ${row.research_summary}`) ? 'agency' : 'direct' } }; });
